component.name: Dorso
component.summary: Posture monitoring with webcam slouch detection

description.p: Dorso monitors your posture in real-time using your webcam and MediaPipe pose detection. When you slouch, a progressive red glow appears on the edges of your screen as a gentle reminder to sit straight. The overlay is fully click-through — your keyboard and mouse work normally.

ul.li: Real-time posture detection via webcam (MediaPipe PoseLandmarker)
Progressive screen overlay — red glow that intensifies with slouch severity
Settings UI — warning mode, intensity, sensitivity, detection speed
Analytics dashboard — daily score, 7-day chart, monitoring time, slouch stats
System tray with posture status and quick access menu
Dark/light theme support (follows system color scheme)
GNOME Shell extension for true always-on-top overlay on all monitors
Works on GNOME Wayland, X11, and Layer Shell compositors (Sway, Hyprland)

screenshot.caption: Calibration — sit in your best posture and click Calibrate
Settings — configure warning mode, intensity, and sensitivity
Analytics — daily posture score and 7-day history
